source_quote: At CA 10 months and 24 months, there were no signiﬁcant differences between the intervention and control groups in the cognitive, motor, and language domains of Bayley-III scores.

source_quote: No differences were found between groups on the Alberta Infant Motor Scale at 2- or 8-months corrected age. Infants in the intervention group showed more optimal ﬁne motor, problem-solving, personal-social, and communication development at 1 month corrected age.
reasoning: Results mention no differences in AIMS scores but do not provide actual numerical values for motor development quotient.

source_quote: Half of the subjects had CP or delay; the outcomes of these infants were not improved by exercise.
